description: A respected member of the community who holds wisdom from long experience. The role is defined by the ability to guide, to hold memory, and to offer a connection to the larger context of the community's story.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'whe' (reciprocity, shared breath) and 'o' (wholeness). The word's structure suggests 'one who embodies the wholeness of our shared breath,' defining an elder by their connection to the community's collective story and spirit.
